summary: Kids Check-in page UI redesign fully tested and verified. All colorful, playful features working correctly including rainbow header, floating decorations, emoji-styled forms, success celebration modal, and pickup code display. SMS notifications are MOCKED (logged to console).

details: Baby emoji icon with sparkle decorations
Opens Add Child modal on click
Modal header: 'Add a Little One' with baby emoji
Subtitle: 'Let's get your child ready for Sunday School!'
Emergency Contact Name and Phone inputs
Orange 'Add Child' submit button with heart icon
Cards display with rounded corners and shadow
Colorful gradient avatar with initial letter
Small emoji decoration on avatar (🦁, 🐸, 🦋, etc.)
Child name, age, and allergy tag displayed
Green border highlight when checked in
Green gradient button with checkmark icon
Triggers check-in API call on click
Party popper icon in green circle
'Have a wonderful time in Sunday School! 🌈' message
YOUR PICKUP CODE box with prominent code display
'SMS notification sent to your phone' message
Dark background with large white monospace text
Displayed in celebration modal and on child card
'Currently in Sunday School' header with 🎓 emoji
SMS notification note: 'We'll text you if your child needs you during service'
Green border highlight on checked-in cards

seed_data_creation: Created test child 'Test Kid 123' via UI to verify Add Child and Check-in flows
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kids Check-in page redesign is complete and fully functional. All colorful UI elements render correctly including rainbow header, floating decorations, emoji-styled form labels, and celebration modal. Check-in flow creates pickup codes and displays success celebration. SMS notifications are MOCKED - the backend logs to console instead of sending real Twilio SMS. CSS classes all have .kc- prefix starting at line 10620 in App.css.

mocked_apis_note.twilio_sms: MOCKED - SMS notifications logged to backend console instead of sending real SMS
mocked_apis_note.note: This is intentional for demo/preview environment

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/kids_checkin_page.png - Main page with rainbow header and child cards
.screenshots/kids_add_modal.png - 'Add a Little One' modal with emoji labels
.screenshots/kids_after_add.png - Page after adding new child with Check In button
.screenshots/kids_checkin_celebration.png - Success celebration modal with pickup code
.screenshots/kids_final_state.png - Both children checked in with summary
